bugs.title: Generated smithing_transform recipes use {item:...} for template/base but hand-authored wave-1 recipes use {id:...} - format inconsistency across recipe set
bugs.expected: Format consistency across all smithing_transform recipes in this mod. Note: MC 1.20.1 historically used {item:...}, MC 1.20.5+ switched to {id:...}. Since the mod targets 5 MC versions (1.20.1, 1.21.1, 1.21.4, 1.21.11, 26.1.2) and recipe JSONs are NOT stonecutter-forked, this may indicate that per-version recipe handling is needed.
bugs.suggested_fix: Either (a) align all 56 smithing_transform recipes (54 generated + 2 hand-authored) to a single format, OR (b) document which MC versions accept which format and ensure compatibility shims exist.

bugs.title: Generated smithing_transform addition uses "#c:..." string while hand-authored wave-1 uses {"tag":"c:..."} object - format inconsistency
bugs.expected: The hand-authored wave-1 recipe uses {"tag": "c:gems/diamond"} (object form). However the cycle-5 feedback explicitly said other recipes in the codebase use the "#c:..." string-prefix style. This is a real conflict between the wave-1 fix recommendation and wave-4 consistency requirement.
bugs.suggested_fix: Pick one canonical format and migrate ALL recipes (existing codebase + wave-1 + wave-4) to it. Recommend the "#c:..." string form since it matches the bulk of pre-existing recipes (per wave-1 verifier observation).
